entities.name: NON-EDIBLE OIL SEED CAKES
entities.description: Materials used to increase the efficiency of fertilizer nitrogen for crop production

entities.name: FERTILIZER NITROGEN
entities.description: Nitrogen-based nutrients applied to crops to enhance growth

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for agricultural output

entities.name: NITRIFICATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting ammonia to nitrate in the soil

entities.name: LEACHING
entities.description: The loss of water-soluble nutrients from the soil due to water movement

entities.name: DENITRIFICATION
entities.description: The microbial process of reducing nitrate to nitrogen gas, leading to nitrogen loss

entities.name: IMMOBILIZATION-REMINERALIZATION
entities.description: The cycle of nitrogen being taken up by microorganisms and subsequently released back into the soil

entities.name: 15N-LABELLED FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Fertilizers containing the stable isotope 15N used for tracing nitrogen movement and transformation

entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITORS
entities.description: Substances that slow down the rate of nitrification to reduce nitrogen loss

entities.name: INDIGENOUS MATERIALS
entities.description: Locally available materials used as nitrification inhibitors

entities.name: 15N METHODOLOGY
entities.description: A technique using 15N-labelled fertilizers to differentiate between nitrification retardation and immobilization-remineralization
